jobs.title: Student Employees – be part of the journey start to finish
jobs.content:
We are looking for student employees to join us and support the rebuild journey from start to finish.

Starting in January, we are looking for student employees for the Rebuild team. You will be hands-on in all daily planning and coordination, outreach and stakeholder management, coordination of gatherings.

We operate through many parallel dialogues, and this role is about creating clarity and structure at the core so the initiative at large can move fast, as intended.

The learning opportunity

You will gain direct exposure to complex, multi-stakeholder processes. You'll participate in real conversations and decision-making, and learn in practice how to build a project with cross European impact through entrepreneurial craft.

What we're looking for

  • Strong structuring skills. Great and quick in writing, preparing materials, setting up decks, communicating externally. Light design skills are always nice.
  • Studies relating to entrepreneurship/strategy/politics
  • Someone with an entrepreneurial mindset, who is driven by being part of this journey
  • We encourage all applicants to apply. You need to be able to work from our office in Copenhagen 15 hours/week

Apply now the straightforward way - send us a link to your profile and concrete highlights of what you've been up to.
